Blazy may seem like a dark horse, but he really shouldn=E2=80=99t. Born in =

Blazy=E2=80=99s Bottega has been something of a slow burn, with sales build=
ing steadily and reviews becoming more emphatic with each season. His Sprin=
g/Summer 2025 collection, which was inspired by the passage of time from ch=

Blazy=E2=80=99s relative youth may be a calculated risk for Chanel. Of all =
the remarkable designers who could have done this job=E2=80=94Mulier, Marc =
Jacobs, Hedi Slimane, Jonathan Anderson, and Simon Porte Jacquemus, to name=

Choosing Blazy would also indicate a lot about Nair=E2=80=99s vision for Ch=
